title: Registered Nurse - Aged Care
teaser: Join a values-driven aged-care provider delivering compassionate, person-centred care on the Gold Coast.
description:
## About the role

We're seeking a compassionate Registered Nurse to join our residential aged-care team. You'll provide high-quality clinical care to residents while leading and mentoring a team of care staff.

## What you'll be doing

- Deliver person-centred clinical care and develop individual care plans
- Administer medications and manage clinical documentation
- Mentor and support enrolled nurses and care workers
- Liaise with families, GPs and allied health professionals

## What we're looking for

- Current AHPRA registration as a Registered Nurse
- Experience in aged or community care (highly regarded)
- Strong communication and assessment skills
- A current National Police Check (or willingness to obtain)

## What's on offer

- Generous not-for-profit salary packaging
- Ongoing professional development and study support
- Flexible rostering with work-life balance

## About Coastline Care

Coastline Care is a leading healthcare & medical organisation. Aged and community care, close to home. We're proud of our inclusive, supportive culture and our commitment to developing our people. (Fictional employer used for demo purposes only — not affiliated with any real company.)

_Apply now to join Coastline Care as a Registered Nurse - Aged Care. We're an equal-opportunity employer and welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds._

description:

## What you'll be doing

- Design and ship features across the full stack (React, TypeScript, Node.js)
- Lead technical design discussions and review code
- Mentor mid-level engineers and raise the engineering bar
- Partner with product and design to deliver customer value

## What we're looking for

- 5+ years building production web applications
- Deep expertise in React, TypeScript and modern Node.js
- Experience with cloud infrastructure (AWS preferred)
- Pragmatic approach to testing, observability and performance

## What's on offer

- Flexible hybrid working and generous leave

- $3,000 annual learning and conference budget
